feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Looking for SAP AI course recommendations
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We’ve been working more closely with SAP AI capabilities lately (especially around S/4HANA and automation scenarios), and we'd love to deepen our knowledge.

For those of you already exploring AI in SAP: Which SAP AI courses from the Learning Hub (or from other SAP related platform) would you actually recommend? Any that are more practical vs. too theoretical?

entry.title: BTP Quota Assignment for Consumption Based Model : Is it a Hard Error ?
entry.content:
As we know BTP allows us to set certain BTP numerical Quota at a subaccount or Directory level.
For Consumption + Subscription model what happens if the user exceeds that quota. For example if we set certain workzone standard user quota assigned to a particular subaccount/directory but on a certain month in productive environment more users login will the user get an error or they will simply be charged for the overconsumption. 
Also does it differ service by service or it is same for all service ? Is there a way to set up alert to notify that they are about to exceed quota.

entry.title: Using Concur API in Build Proces Automation
entry.content:
Hi, 

in SAP Build Process Automation we're trying to access Concur data via API. 

We tried to run GET Retrieve Users (Identity v4 API) and stated /profile/identity/v4 as Resource Path and received this message: 

"{\"status\":400,\"schemas\":[\"urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error\",\"urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:concur:2.0:Error\"],\"urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:concur:2.0:Error\":{\"messages\":[{\"code\":\"BAD_REQUEST\"}]},\"detail\":\"Company ID is required\"}"

We're assuming that there's something missing within our destination configuration in our BTP subaccount. 
We used the following settings:

Type: HTTP
Proxy Type: Internet
URL: https://eu2.api.concursolutions.com
Authentication: OAuth2ClientCredentials
Client ID
Client Secret
Token Service URL: https://eu2.api.concursolutions.com/oauth2/v0/token
Token Service URL Type: Dedicated

Additional Properties
companyID


In Concur we generated an OAuth2 App with the Grants refresh_token, client_credentials and password and selected all available scopes.

Any hints on how to make this API work are greatly appreciated!

Thanks
Franziska

entry.title: How to configure Single Sign-On (SSO) between S/4HANA Cloud and BTP
entry.content:
I have subscribed to SAP Business Technology Platform and developed an application using SAP Business Application Studio. The application was successfully deployed to the Cloud Foundry environment.

After that, I created a custom app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud and assigned the final application URL (obtained from BAS) to the app so that the application can be launched directly from the S/4HANA Cloud system.

Currently, the application can be executed successfully from S/4HANA Cloud. However, users are required to enter BTP credentials every time they access the application. Since business users of the S/4HANA Cloud system are not able to provide BTP credentials for each execution, this approach is not convenient for them.

I found that Single Sign-On (SSO) needs to be configured between S/4HANA Cloud and BTP to avoid repeated authentication.

Could you please share any blogs, reference guides, or official documentation that explain how to configure SSO between these two systems?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Erro ao tentar ativer o ativar o SAP Build Apps (plano free)
entry.content:
Estou tentando ativar o SAP Build Apps (plano free) no subaccount trial, mas a assinatura fica em Subscription Failed.

O booster Get Started with SAP Build Apps não avança na etapa Select Scenario devido a falta de quota. 

Já criei novo subaccount e repeti o processo, o erro persiste.

 

Preciso de ajuda, por favor.

entry.title: SAP Integration suite |cloud integration | Egress IPs | Clarification needed
entry.content:
We have shared IPs from SAP documentation, but it is very wide list of IPs and they are asking to share specific set of IPs from where traffic will be initiated in cloud integration. Can you please suggest if there is possibility to limit the Egress Ips for SFTP based scenarios.

There was also a question whether these Ips are used for any other customer or its dedicated to our company. Can you please confirm ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Expose Joule Studio Agent/Skills as API for UI-triggered intelligent insights (without chatbot inter
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’m currently exploring SAP Joule Studio capabilities and wanted to understand if it’s possible to expose Joule Studio agents or skills as an API/service so they can be triggered programmatically from a UI rather than through the Joule chatbot interface.

Use Case:
In our application UI, users interact with specific components (for example, clicking a marker or icon on a screen). When the user clicks this marker, we want to:

  1. Immediately trigger a backend call.

  2. Invoke a Joule Studio Agent or Skill that generates intelligent insights based on the context/data of that UI component.

  3. Return the generated insight and display it directly in a UI card or insight panel.

So instead of the user asking a question through the chatbot prompt, the insight is automatically generated and displayed on the UI based on the user action.

What I want to confirm:

  • Is it possible to expose Joule Studio agents/skills as an API endpoint that can be invoked programmatically?

  • Can Joule-generated insights be returned as structured output suitable for embedding in a custom UI component/card?

  • Are there recommended patterns or SAP services (e.g., AI Core, AI Launchpad, CAP services, etc.) that should be used to orchestrate this?

  • If Joule Studio itself cannot be directly exposed as an API, what would be the recommended architecture to achieve this UI-driven intelligent insight pattern?

The goal is to enable context-aware insights triggered directly from UI interactions, rather than requiring users to manually prompt a chatbot.

Any guidance, architecture suggestions, or documentation references would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: While configuring the SAp BUild Apps i am getting below error.
entry.content: Couldn't subscribe to Cloud Identity Services. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.

entry.title: @sap/cap-rfc update to use a RFC websocket destination
entry.content: Will there be an update to the @sap/cap-rfc library to use a destination from the btp destination service, that is configured as RFC Websocket, since the Cloud Connector 2.19 allows such connections? This would make it easier for applications to use secured rfc connections with principal propagation without configuring SNC.

entry.title: XSUAA not getting the subject name identifier as ID
entry.content:
Hi,

We're trying to change `req.user.id` used from xsuaa to the User ID of IAS instead of the email.

BTP is connected to IAS with OpenID Connect (so "Default Name ID Format = Unspecified" as with SAML is not available). 

In the IAS logs the sub is changed to the expected value `jwtPayload="{"sub":"`.

However the req.user.id we get in CAP / JWT token remains the email.

Not sure if it's related, but adding a custom atribute in `xs-security.json` and in IAS attributes also isn't reflected in `req.user.attr`. (it only shows the default value configured in `xs-security.json`)

Anyone have some insights on how to get the id ?

entry.title: What’s one SAP feature you wish more customers used?
entry.content:
Hello everyone! 

In a recent project we realized we were barely using some capabilities that were already available in the system, which made me curious.

Is there any SAP feature that you think customers are not using enough (or forgetting completely) in real projects? Something that could actually make a difference but almost never gets adopted.

entry.title: 401 Unauthorized when sending notifications from CAP using SAP_Notifications destination
entry.content:
I am creating a CAP application to send notifications and configured the SAP_Notifications destination according to the documentation below.

When I call the API using Postman, it works correctly, but when I try to call it from my application, it always returns 401 Unauthorized.

I also tried calling it directly using the SAP Cloud SDK, following this documentation: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/developing-cloud-foundry-applications-with-notifications

Documentation used to configure the destination:
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/enabling-notifications-for-custom-apps-on-sap-btp-cloud-foundry#configure-the-destination-to-the-notifications-service

Additionally, I tried using @cap-js/notifications, but I always receive 401, both locally and after deployment.

Does anyone know what could be causing this or how to fix it?

Additional information:

  • Destination configuration screenshot

  • Postman request working screenshot

The configurations are the same as the ones generated in Work Zone for the notification service.

The BTP logs show a 401 Unauthorized error during the content deployment process in BTP.

If anyone has faced this issue before, I would appreciate any guidance.

entry.title: What topics are you most interested in at SAP Sapphire this year?
entry.content:
Hi everyone!! As probably most of you, we're looking forward to attending SAP Sapphire this year. 

I was wondering if anyone else here is planning to attend, and, if so: What topics or announcers are you most interested in at SAP Sapphire this year? Are you planning to learn about new product announcements or to see real customer use cases?

entry.title: Semantic Object Navigation not working for Alternative Entity in Fiori Elements List Report
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on a Fiori Elements List Report application where semantic object navigation works correctly for my main service entity Case, but it does not work for an alternative entity ErpCase.

Scenario:

  • Main service entity: Case

  • Alternative entity: ErpCase

  • The List Report is generated using the main entity Case.

  • Semantic object navigation is configured and works correctly when the navigation originates from the Case entity.

However, I also expose ErpCase as an alternative entity with its own route (for example navigating to an ErpCase object page). When the navigation originates from ErpCase , the semantic object navigation does not trigger.

If anyone has implemented semantic navigation for alternative entities in a List Report, I would appreciate any guidance.

entry.title: SAP Business Technology Platform and SAP Integration Suit - Segregation of Duties Role Matrix
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community Experts, While reviewing SAP Note 2782388, I was unable to find a standard cloud Segregation of Duties (SoD) ruleset covering SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry) and SAP Integration Suite

We are currently designing a manual SoD matrix and would like to align with SAP recommended best practices.

Could you please help with one or more of the following

1. Is there any official SAP standard SoD ruleset (or reference content) available for:

  • SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry) platform role collections (Global Account / Directory / Subaccount SAP Integration Suite role collections (Cloud Integration, API Management, Grap. 

2. If no standard ruleset exists, could you share recommended SoD guidance, such as:

  • A reference document, blog, or SAP Help page
  • A list of high risk role combinations (top 10–15) that should not be assigned to the same user, for example:
  • Between BTP platform role collections
  • Between SAP Integration Suite role collections
  • Between BTP platform roles and Integration Suite roles

3. From your experience, which role collections are considered “critical” or “admin level” and should generally be segregated (for example: tenant admin vs developer, transport vs development, configuration vs monitoring)?

Any guidance, references, or practical experience would be highly helpful

Thanks

Raj

entry.title: Request for Automated Cancellation Attribution in Class Registration System - SFL
entry.content:
Hi All.  I have a question regarding the class registration cancellation process in SuccessFactors. When an employee registered for a class is cancelled, it is essential for the system to automatically identify the title of the person who performed the cancellation behind the scenes. The cancellation report should indicate whether the action was: manager denied, administrator cancelled, employee cancelled, or cancellation via connector file.

We would like to avoid having users manually select who cancelled the registration. Instead, for the system to be able to determine and record the appropriate cancellation attribution internally. Could you please advise if this functionality is possible?

Thank you Yolande

entry.title: My Inbox in Build Work Zone Error Message: Title: ErrorMessage: Could not open app. Please try again
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an app I built in SAP Build apps that's connected to an approval workflow in build process automation. We're using Build Work Zone to run the custom application and the "my inbox." I am however running into an error message of this: 

Title: ErrorMessage: Could not open app. Please try again later.Details: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'com.sap.spa.inbox-content'Error: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'com.sap.spa.inbox-content' at i (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.145.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:535:424) at c.e [as register] (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.145.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:433:709) at https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.145.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:421:2670 at c.constructor (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.145.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:421:2872) at c.constructor (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.145.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:517:1377) at c.constructor (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.145.0/resources/sap/ui/core/library-preload.js:550:1101) at new c (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.145.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:439:4578) at https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.145.0/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-3.js:261:15455 at new Promise (<anonymous>) at j.createApplication

Under content manager in build work zone I have added the HTML5 version of My Inbox as well as the local copy. On my workzone site I have only the local copy visible. I have this working just fine in our dev environment, however in production it is saying there is a duplicate ID issue.

Any suggestions on how to resolve? I'm not a BTP expert by any means and have been struggling trying to fix this last hurdle.

Thanks, 
Laura G.

entry.title: ProcessDirect Header Propagation Issue – BP_NUMBER Not Available in Called iFlows
entry.content:
Hello SAP Cloud Integration experts,

I’m working on an integration scenario where I’ve decomposed a large iFlow into multiple smaller iFlows using the ProcessDirect adapter. The main iFlow calls three separate iFlows in parallel:

Billing
BUPA
Accounting

Requirement

I need to pass a bp_number (Business Partner Number) from the incoming HTTP request to all called iFlows dynamically.

What I implemented

Extracted bp_number from query parameters using a Groovy script

Stored it as:
Exchange Property → BP_NUMBER
Message Header → BP_NUMBER

Before calling ProcessDirect, I ensured:

Header: BP_NUMBER = ${property.BP_NUMBER}

In the called iFlows, I use:

${header.BP_NUMBER} inside HTTP receiver queries.
I even added BP_NUMBER in the allowed headers for all the child flows inside the Integration Process Runtime Configuration

Issue

In all called iFlows, BP_NUMBER is coming as empty (''), causing API failures:


Is using headers the recommended way to pass dynamic values across iFlows?

Any guidance or best practices would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Failed to fetch oAuth token from IFlow
entry.content:
Hi CPI Experts,

I am trying to fetch a set of data using IFlow from an api which is publically available and secured with oAuth.
I have created a security material with the following details:

Then I am using this in the IFlow as 

 

When I trigger the IFlow, fetching auth token fails with the error:

com.google.common.util.concurrent.UncheckedExecutionException: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Exception occured while fetching OAuth Token. Reason: mysite.com: Name or service not known, cause: java.net.UnknownHostException: mysite.com: Name or service not known

 

I have tested the API and credential from Bruno and it is working, which indicates that there is no issue with the application server.

Any inputs are much appreciated.
Thanks.

entry.title: SAP DRC in BTP Trial?
entry.content: Hi, is there a way to try out SAP DRC, Cloud Edition in my BTP trial?
